title: Crystal Ball Narrative
description: Prompt works that compress a complete story world into a single crystal ball, using refraction, scale, and miniature scenes.

en.title: Crystal Ball Narrative
en.description: Prompt works that compress a complete story world into a single crystal ball, using refraction, scale, and miniature scenes.

zh-CN.title: 水晶球叙事
zh-CN.description: 把完整叙事世界压缩进一颗水晶球，通过折射、尺度和微缩场景呈现。
